title: Better Exploration +
description: This modpack adds a lot to better your adventure to Minecraft. It also adds a new terrain, mobs/entities, structures, and more!
body:
![BE+ Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/878e339a6fb89ce67c83bee3d86e57377db84598.png)

### BETTER EXPLORATION +
_A modpack that is made to give Minecraft the revival it needs._
_(This is a new version of Better Exploration)_
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

## **FEATURES**
1. New Terrain
2. Multiplayer through Essentials
3. Better Dimensions
4. Better Structures
5. Bosses and new Mobs
6. Quality of Life
7. Voice chat
8. Optimization 
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
